# PiKaOs

> A Thai-first multi-agent "agent-ops" workspace (Vite+React frontend + FastAPI backend, run as
> Docker stacks), plus the **PiKaOs-Standalone** line — big features shipped as their own apps and
> folded back into the main platform. All project knowledge lives in `PiKaOs-docs/docs/` (English,
> AI-first, one concept per file, every file carries YAML frontmatter). This file is the LLM/agent
> navigation map; the auto-loaded operating contract is `CLAUDE.md`.

## Start here
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): the one shared router — always-on rules + a task router into the owning doc (auto-loaded by Claude Code).
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): tool-agnostic entry pointing to the router.
- [docs index](PiKaOs-docs/docs/README.md): the documentation map — which doc owns which topic, in what order to read.
- [GLOSSARY.md](PiKaOs-docs/docs/GLOSSARY.md): domain terms.
- [principles.html](PiKaOs-docs/principles.html): visual overview of the principles/workflows as graphs (human presentation; .md is the source of truth).

## Rules & conventions
- [dev rules §0–§6](PiKaOs-docs/docs/pikaos-dev-rules.md): running · frontend · backend · infra · auth · data · standalone lifecycle.
- [frontmatter standard](PiKaOs-docs/docs/templates/frontmatter.md) + [templates](PiKaOs-docs/docs/templates/README.md): copy-to-create scaffolds.

## Architecture
- [system-design](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/system-design.md): engine blueprint.
- [data-model](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/data-model.md): as-built ER, table by table.
- [database-design](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/database-design.md): DB/ER design rules + when to split a database.
- [ports registry](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/ports.md) · [versions registry](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/versions.md): single sources of truth.
- [deploy](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/deploy.md) · [tech-stack](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/tech-stack.md) · [modularity](PiKaOs-docs/docs/architecture/modularity.md).

## Process & runbooks
- [session-handoff](PiKaOs-docs/docs/process/session-handoff.md): current status + resume prompt.
- [playbook](PiKaOs-docs/docs/process/playbook.md) · [lessons](PiKaOs-docs/docs/process/lessons.md).
- [ai-runbooks R1–R8](PiKaOs-docs/docs/process/ai-runbooks.md): pause/resume · new session/move machine · remove lib/file · audit deps · incident/rollback · release/deploy · expose open standalone · create a skill.

## Standalone line
- [standalone contract](PiKaOs-docs/docs/standalone/README.md): the line every standalone obeys.
- [Compare](PiKaOs-docs/docs/standalone/compare/README.md) · [RedirectMap](PiKaOs-docs/docs/standalone/redirectmap/README.md).

## Starting other projects
- [new-project scaffolder](PiKaOs-docs/docs/prompts/new-project-scaffold.md): bootstrap a non-PiKaOs project (`[Name]-Project/` + `[Name]-{Main,Docs,Standalone}`) with this whole structure.
- [knowledge-refactorer](PiKaOs-docs/docs/prompts/knowledge-refactorer.md): refactor an existing project's docs into this architecture.
